title: SpiceOfLife: Latiao
description: This mod is an extension of the Spice of Life series and adds three new mechanics along with their corresponding configuration files
body:
⚠️ This section is translated by AI. If anything is unclear, please refer to the original Chinese documentation.

This mod is an extension of the Spice of Life series and adds three new mechanics along with their corresponding configuration files:

### 1. Dynamic adjustment of food values
The hunger (food level), saturation, and eating time of foods will be dynamically modified ,**Support Block food**.
Repeatedly eating the same food will gradually reduce its restoration amount.

### 2. Natural hunger
Over time, the player’s food level will slowly decrease.

### 3. Sleep
After waking up from sleep, the player will lose food level proportionally to the amount of time slept.

QoL additions: **AppleSkin Support** for food containers,Jade support for **Display Block Food Information** (AppleSkin),SpiceOfLife Series **Block Food Diversity** support,Sophisticated Backpacks auto-feeding,AFK hunger protection,and other TODO.

Tested through multiple server runs and confirmed to work properly on the vast majority of modded servers.

This mod is inspired by The Spice of Life, Hunger Overhaul,and MITE.

It is a **hard-mode lifestyle adjustment mod**, which means that players’ **mid- to late-game food requirements will increase significantly**.

The mod is aimed at players who enjoy farming / retirement-style / survival gameplay, providing an effective way to consume large quantities of food stored in their storage systems.

The default configuration formula is intentionally challenging; it is recommended to use this mod together with three or more food-related modpacks, seasonal mods, or survival-oriented mods for the best experience.

---

本模组为生活调味料系列的补充，添加三个机制与其相应的配置文件。

### 1.动态修改食物的饱食度，饱和度，食用时间，**支持方块食物**，
多次食用相同食物的回复量将逐渐减少。

### 2.自然饥饿
随着时间流逝，降低玩家饱食度。

### 3.睡眠
睡醒后将移除睡眠时间相应的玩家饱食度

附加Qol：**食物容器苹果皮支持**，**Jade方块食物信息显示(苹果皮)**，生活调味料系列**方块食物多样性**支持，AFK饥饿保护，精妙背包自动喂食，其余TODO项。

通过多次服务器运行测试，确认在绝大多数模组服务器上都能正常运行。

这个模组的灵感来源于生活调味料、饥饿改革、MITE。

这是一个**困难向生活调整**模组，这意味着玩家**中后期**的**食物需求**将**显著增加**。

该模组主要面向喜欢耕作/养老/生存玩法的玩家，提供了一种有效消耗存储系统中大量食物储备的方法。

默认配置公式有意设置了挑战性，建议将此模组与三个或更多与食物相关的模组包或季节类或生存类模组一起使用，以获得最佳体验。
